request_payload.exposure_text: As a retired NATO intelligence officer, I've seen firsthand how vital our alliances are for national security. The data shows that countries that maintain strong commitments to mutual defense frameworks experience 40% fewer security incidents. We can't afford to weaken these bonds. Our duty is to uphold the principles that keep us safe. #StrongAlliances #NationalSecurity
